description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:bionic Docker image with a before_script that runs `apt-get update -yq && apt-get -y install build-essential qt5-qmake qtbase5-dev qtdeclarative5-dev` followed by `apt-get -y install lcov gcovr`. Define two stages, build and test. In the build stage add a `build_desktop` job that runs `export QT_SELECT=qt5`, `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `qmake CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=coverage ..`, and `make -j2`, then publishes the `build/` directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a `test_desktop` job that depends on `build_desktop`, runs `find build | xargs touch`, `cd build`, and `make coverage-html` to generate an HTML coverage report.
